videoSnippet.title: A Brilliant Losing Move That Wins!
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Nihal Sarin (3305) - Firouzja, Alireza (3337) 
Bullet Chess Championship 2026 (Chess.com) [03-22] 2026.06.25
A05 Reti opening

1.Nf3 Nf6 2.g3 d5 3.Bg2 e6 4.O-O Be7 5.d3 O-O 6.Nbd2 b6 7.e4 dxe4 8.dxe4 Bb7 9.e5 Nfd7 10.Re1 Nc6 11.c3 Qc8 12.Qc2 Rd8 13.h4 Nc5 14.Bf1 a5 15.Ne4 Nxe4 16.Rxe4 Na7 17.Rf4 h6 18.Nh2 Qd7 19.Be3 Qc6 20.Nf3 g5 21.hxg5 hxg5 22.Rxf7 Kxf7 23.Qh7+ Ke8 24.Qh5+ Kd7 25.Nd4 Rh8 26.Nxc6 Rxh5 27.Rd1+ Ke8 28.Be2 Rh8
